app module¶

app.app.add()¶

Handle memo creation.

  • GET: Render the memo creation page.

  • POST: Save a new memo and redirect to the main page.

Returns:

Rendered add page or redirect response.

Return type:

HTML or Response

app.app.api_create_memo()¶

Create a new memo. — tags:

  • Memos

Parameters:

name (-) – memo in: formData type: string required: true description: The content of the memo

responses:
201:

description: Memo created successfully schema:

type: object properties:

message:

type: string

app.app.api_delete_memo(id)¶

Delete a memo. — tags:

  • Memos

Parameters:

name (-) – id in: path type: integer required: true description: The ID of the memo to delete

responses:
200:

description: Memo deleted successfully schema:

type: object properties:

message:

type: string

404:

description: Memo not found schema:

type: object properties:

error:

type: string

app.app.api_get_memo(id)¶

Get a single memo by ID. — tags:

  • Memos

Parameters:

name (-) – id in: path type: integer required: true description: The ID of the memo

responses:
200:

description: Memo found schema:

type: object properties:

memo:

type: object properties:

id:

type: integer

content:

type: string

404:

description: Memo not found schema:

type: object properties:

error:

type: string

app.app.api_get_memos()¶

Get all memos. — tags:

  • Memos

responses:
200:

description: List of all memos schema:

type: object properties:

memos:

type: array items:

type: object properties:

id:

type: integer

content:

type: string

app.app.api_update_memo(id)¶

Update an existing memo. — tags:

  • Memos

Parameters:

  • name (-) – id in: path type: integer required: true description: The ID of the memo to update

  • name – memo in: formData type: string required: true description: The new content for the memo

responses:
200:

description: Memo updated successfully schema:

type: object properties:

message:

type: string

404:

description: Memo not found schema:

type: object properties:

error:

type: string

app.app.delete()¶

Render the memo deletion page.

Displays the list of memos that can be deleted.

Returns:

Rendered delete page with memo list.

Return type:

HTML

app.app.detail(id)¶

Display the detail page of a specific memo.

Retrieves a single memo by its ID and displays it.

Parameters:

id (int) – The ID of the memo to display.

Returns:

Rendered detail page with memo information.

Return type:

HTML

app.app.edit(id)¶

Handle memo editing.

  • GET: Display the memo edit page.

  • POST: Update the memo and redirect to the main page.

Parameters:

id (int) – The ID of the memo to edit.

Returns:

Rendered edit page or redirect response.

Return type:

HTML or Response

app.app.index()¶

Render the main page with memo list.

Retrieves all memos from the service layer and displays them on the index page.

Returns:

Rendered index page containing the memo list.

Return type:

HTML

app.app.remove(id)¶

Delete a memo by ID.

Removes the specified memo and redirects to the delete page.

Parameters:

id (int) – The ID of the memo to delete.

Returns:

Redirect response to the delete page.

Return type:

Response

opensource
